---
title: "Project 4 Report"
author: "Joe Nagel"
date: ""
output: 
  pdf_document:
    number_sections: true
fontsize: 12pt
mainfont: Helvetica
geometry: margin=1in
header-includes:
  - \usepackage{float}
  - \usepackage{setspace}
  - \doublespacing
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(list(echo = FALSE, include = FALSE))
```

```{r}
# read in packages
library(tidyverse)
library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)
library(hdrm)
library(tictoc)
library(olsrr)
library(glmnet)
library(broom)
library(janitor)
library(furrr)
source("model_selection.R")
```

```{r}
# define simulation parameters
params = list(
    replications = 10,
    n = c(250, 500),
    p = 20,
    beta = c((1:5)/6, rep(0, 15)),
    rho = c(0, 0.35, 0.7),
    alpha = 0.5,
    p_val = 0.15,
    nvar = length(beta),
    family = "gaussian",
    correlation_structure = "exchangeable",
    seed = 4130
)
params$nvar = length(params$beta)
```

```{r}
run_simulation <- function(n, rho, params) {
    simulated_data <- gen_data(
        n = n,
        rho = rho,
        p = params$nvar,
        beta = params$beta,
        family = params$family,
        corr = params$correlation_structure
    )
    
    reduced_models = get_reduced_models(
        simulated_data = simulated_data,
        alpha = params$alpha,
        p_val = params$p_val
    )
    
    output = (
        map(reduced_models, ~broom::tidy(., conf.int = TRUE))
        %>% bind_rows(.id = "selection_method")
        %>% select(-c(std.error, statistic))
    )
    
    return(output)
}
```


```{r}
tic()

set.seed(params$seed)

plan(multisession, workers = parallel::detectCores() - 1)
simulation_results = (
    expand_grid(
        n = params$n,
        rho = params$rho,
        replication = 1:params$replications
    )
    %>% mutate(
        result = future_map2(
            n, rho,
            \(n, rho) run_simulation(n, rho, params = params),
            .options = furrr_options(seed = TRUE)
        )
    )
    %>% unnest(result)
    %>% janitor::clean_names()
)
plan(sequential)

saveRDS(params, file = "../Data/simulation_parameters.rds")
write_csv(simulation_results, "../Data/simulation_results.csv")

toc()
```

```{r}
simulation_results
```

```{r}
df <- gen_data(
        n = 250,
        rho = 0,
        p = params$nvar,
        beta = params$beta,
        family = params$family,
        corr = params$correlation_structure
    )
mod <- lm(y ~ 0, data = data.frame(y = df$y, df$X))
tidy(mod)
```


# Introduction

# Methods

# Results

# Discussion and Conclusion

# Reproducible Research

## GitHub Link

`https://github.com/nageljo/BIOS6624`
